summary: Plan-only live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was provided or inferred; each open PR is classified independently from the hydrated preflight artifact. No close, merge, fix, or security routing action is safe or allowed for this shard.

actions.reason: Low-signal docs/provider PR lacks passing behavior proof and cannot be closed under this job's disabled low-signal closeout permissions.
Focused open PR with sufficient proof, but this shard only classifies inventory and cannot recommend merge without merge permission and merge preflight.
Focused non-security gateway PR with passing checks, but message-delivery risk and missing merge preflight make it a maintainer review item outside this plan-only close/comment/label shard.
Large but coherent open PR with passing proof/checks; compatibility and message-delivery risk require maintainer review and merge preflight, so it is kept independent.
Focused open doctor bug-fix PR with passing proof/checks, but this job cannot merge and has no merge preflight, so it remains an independent maintainer-review candidate.
